title: Subtotal 2014
description: Complete the subtotal section of your tax return.

content_blocks.text: If you show income at TOTAL INCOME OR LOSS on page 3 of your tax return:

items: take away the amount at TOTAL DEDUCTIONS from the amount at TOTAL INCOME OR LOSS ; write the result at SUBTOTAL
if the amount at SUBTOTAL is less than zero, print L in the LOSS box at the right of the amount.

content_blocks.text: If you show a loss at TOTAL INCOME OR LOSS on page 3 of your tax return:

items: add the amount at TOTAL DEDUCTIONS to the amount at TOTAL INCOME OR LOSS
write the result at SUBTOTAL ; print L in the LOSS box at the right of the amount.
Go to question L1 Tax losses of earlier income years .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions .
Go back to question Total deductions .

content_text:
## Completing your tax return
If you show income at TOTAL INCOME OR LOSS on page 3 of your tax return:
- take away the amount at TOTAL DEDUCTIONS from the amount at TOTAL INCOME OR LOSS ; write the result at SUBTOTAL
- if the amount at SUBTOTAL is less than zero, print L in the LOSS box at the right of the amount.
If you show a loss at TOTAL INCOME OR LOSS on page 3 of your tax return:
- add the amount at TOTAL DEDUCTIONS to the amount at TOTAL INCOME OR LOSS
- write the result at SUBTOTAL ; print L in the LOSS box at the right of the amount.
### Where to go next
- Go to question L1 Tax losses of earlier income years .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions .
- Go back to question Total deductions .
